hero.headline1: AI Automation That Saves You Hours
hero.sub1: We audit your workflows, find where AI saves time and money, and build the solution. You just tell us if it works.
hero.badge2: Built by AI, managed by AI
hero.sub2: From lead capture to invoice generation — we automate the workflows that drain your time.
hero.headline3: Stop Doing What Machines Can Do
hero.sub3: Every hour you spend on repetitive tasks is an hour you're not growing your business. Let's fix that.

services.title: How We Work
services.subtitle: Simple pricing. Start free, scale when you see results.
services.freePilotDesc: Try before you buy. We automate one workflow and you tell us if it works.
services.standardDesc: Full implementation. We audit, design, and build your custom automation.
services.retainerDesc: Ongoing optimization. We keep your automations running and improve them.

portfolio.title: What We Build
portfolio.subtitle: Real projects, real automation. Here's what we've been working on.

about.title: Built by an Automation Obsessive
about.bio1: I'm Yonatan Perlin, founder of Workitu Tech. I've built 39+ automation projects — from AI agents that run businesses to workflow pipelines that save hours of manual work every day.
about.bio2: My AI Chief of Staff, Bee, manages my entire operation: tasks, email, calendar, daily briefings, and even deploys code autonomously. Now I'm bringing that same capability to your business.
about.agentsDesc: Autonomous agents that handle tasks, emails, and scheduling
about.workflowDesc: n8n flows, cron jobs, and event-driven pipelines
about.fullstackDesc: Web apps, APIs, dashboards, and internal tools
about.aiIntegrationDesc: Claude, GPT, Whisper, and custom ML pipelines

contact.title: Let's Talk Automation
contact.subtitle: Tell me about the repetitive work that eats your time. I'll show you how to automate it.
